name: rest-api-transfer
description: Sends processed data to a REST API endpoint via HTTP POST/PUT/PATCH.
author: hermes-core

url.title: API URL
url.description: The full URL of the REST API endpoint to send data to.

method.title: HTTP Method
method.description: HTTP method to use for sending data.

headers.title: HTTP Headers
headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to include in the request.

auth_token.title: Auth Token / API Key
auth_token.description: Bearer token, Base64-encoded basic credentials, or API key value.

api_key_header.title: API Key Header Name
api_key_header.description: Header name for API key authentication.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: If input is an array, send records in batches of this size. 0 means send all at once.

status_code.description: HTTP status code from the target API.

response.description: Response body from the target API.
